message:
fix(overflow): use saturating arithmetic to prevent overflow in span and semaphore

- SymbolValidityWindow::span(): Use saturating_add(1) to handle infinite windows
  where end=u64::MAX would overflow on +1
- Semaphore::add_permits(): Use saturating_add to prevent overflow when adding
  permits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
